title: Cloak of Elvenkind
excerpt: While you wear this cloak, Wisdom (perception) checks made to perceive you have disadvantage, and you have advantage on Dexterity (stealth) checks....
markdown:
# Cloak of Elvenkind

While you wear this cloak, Wisdom ([[perception]]) checks made to perceive you have [[disadvantage]], and you have [[advantage]] on Dexterity ([[stealth]]) checks.
